Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tal’gullour]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Tal’gullour is a stronghold in Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Tal’gullour is a planet-sized fortress floating in space.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Daruman forged his original Iteration into the fortress Tal’gullour.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Tal’gullour is the Fortress of the Mad King.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Tal’gullour is the fortress and homeworld of Daruman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Tal’gullour is larger than most habitable planets.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Tal’gullour can release a thousand lines of light that act as a barrage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Tal’gullour fires bolts of gold that warp space.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
